creator: walkingshadow@grummel.net
text:
The A68k assembler which is part of TIGCC failed to build on several architectures.
It was removed in the latest CVS version and was replaced by a GNU AS wrapper.
I merged the CVS version of A68k into the port. It should build fine now.
I also cleaned up the Makefile a bit. It now respects NOPORTDOCS and installs
documentation and examples files into DOCSDIR and EXAMPLESDIR respectively instead
of PREFIX/PORTNAME.
PORTREVISION was bumped.

Best regards,
Jona
